subject: Replace config using ingress host port template
commit_message:
Replace config using ingress host port template

Depending on the ingress robot configuration
host and port template should choose ingress
host and port or direct cluster host and port

Change-Id: If1ba88c2fa14ca5d5dd21e559f08fb3fcc815792
Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-2341
Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>

clearwater and free_radius => the error is a known error due to // on SDC side
as the 3 projects ask if a vendor exists and if not try to create it, it may create a race condition that can lead to this error.
usually basic_vm is the quicker and is PASS
